segments.caption: The video opens with Kendall Jenner entering a bright, stylishly decorated room with wooden floors, bookshelves, and a clothing rack. She greets the audience with a smile, introducing herself and the theme: '7 Days, 7 Looks with Kendall Jenner.' The scene transitions to a title card showcasing five different outfits, followed by a focus on Monday’s look. Kendall appears in a black tee by Sunday Best, paired with high-waisted black jeans she describes as her 'most favorite ever' for their perfect fit and length. She wears a sleeveless red sweater draped over her shoulders, which she notes is from Khaite and serves as a versatile layer. She highlights the jeans’ high waist and long length, ideal for her tall frame, and mentions her love for the comfort and style of her brown loafers. The camera alternates between full-body shots and close-ups, emphasizing the outfit’s details and her confident, relaxed demeanor as she gestures and speaks directly to the camera. The room remains consistent throughout, with natural light and tasteful decor enhancing the fashion-focused atmosphere.

discovered_new_entities.Kendall Jenner: Wearing a black tee by Sunday Best, high-waisted black jeans, and a sleeveless red sweater from Khaite, paired with brown loafers; she gestures expressively while describing her outfit in a bright, stylish room.
discovered_new_entities.Sunday Best black tee: A simple, fitted black t-shirt worn as the base layer of the outfit.
discovered_new_entities.Khaite sleeveless red sweater: A vibrant red, sleeveless sweater draped over the shoulders, described as a favorite layering piece.
discovered_new_entities.High-waisted black jeans: Long, slim-fit black jeans with a high waist, praised for their perfect fit and length.
discovered_new_entities.Brown loafers: Comfortable, almost-brown leather loafers worn with the outfit, noted for their style and comfort.

segments.caption: The video opens with a close-up of brown loafers on a wooden floor, accompanied by the text 'I love these loafers, they're actually super comfortable.' The scene transitions to Kendall Jenner in a bright, stylish room with bookshelves, a clothing rack, and a full-length mirror. She is wearing a Sunday Best black tee, high-waisted black jeans, and a Khaite sleeveless red sweater draped over her shoulders, paired with the brown loafers. She walks confidently, adjusting her sunglasses and gesturing as she speaks. She mentions never leaving the house or hotel without sunglasses, describing her vintage Gucci sunglasses as a favorite. She then picks up a brand new Bottega bag, highlighting its size and versatility. On-screen labels identify key outfit elements: 'Layers,' 'Big Bag,' 'Baby Tee,' 'Fav Jeans,' 'Loafers,' and 'Vintage Sunglasses.' The scene shifts to a new look for 'Tuesday,' where she wears a vintage Dolce & Gabbana dress and black Gucci boots, holding a small clutch. She explains the dress is perfect for fashion week, allowing her to move easily between events. Close-ups show the boots, which she says are comfortable and stylish. The video ends with her walking in the boots, emphasizing their comfort and suitability for the week ahead.

segments.caption: The video opens with Kendall Jenner walking confidently down a city sidewalk, wearing a form-fitting beige vintage Dolce & Gabbana dress, black Gucci boots, and carrying a Bottega bag, while photographers capture her. The scene transitions to a bright, stylish room with bookshelves, a clothing rack, and a full-length mirror, where she presents her outfit. She highlights the vintage Dolce & Gabbana dress as a comfortable and practical choice for Milan Fashion Week, paired with her signature black Gucci boots and a Bottega bag. She then puts on vintage Gucci sunglasses, emphasizing their role as a daily staple. On-screen text labels identify the key pieces: 'Vintage Dress,' 'Vintage Boots,' 'Clutch,' and 'Gucci Sunglasses.' After showcasing the look, she transitions to a new outfit for Wednesday: a white t-shirt and blue jeans, described as her 'going to work' or 'meeting look' and a personal uniform. She gestures to the outfit, noting its simplicity and comfort, and then adds a beige The Row coat as a special touch. The room remains consistent throughout, with natural lighting and a curated, stylish aesthetic, emphasizing her fashion-forward yet practical approach to dressing.

active_entities.Kendall Jenner: Wearing a form-fitting beige vintage Dolce & Gabbana dress, black Gucci boots, and carrying a Bottega bag; later switches to a white t-shirt and blue jeans with a beige The Row coat; she gestures expressively while describing each outfit in a bright, stylish room.

segments.caption: Kendall Jenner stands in a bright, stylish room with wooden floors, bookshelves, and a clothing rack, presenting a casual yet polished outfit. She begins by putting on a beige The Row coat over a white t-shirt and blue jeans, describing it as a 'Sunday Best tee' and emphasizing its stretchy, thick fabric. She highlights the jeans as her 'exact black jean' from Khaite, expressing her enduring love for them. She then showcases her black boots, calling them her 'ultimate favorite' and a 'take on a riding boot,' reflecting her equestrian background. She gestures toward the boots while smiling, saying she feels like she 'would be' this boot if she were one. Next, she turns to a full-length mirror and puts on a pair of vintage Gucci sunglasses, stating she can't leave the house without them. She mentions having many vintage Gucci sunglasses and that she just 'really likes' them. The room remains consistent with natural light, plants, and decor, creating a warm, curated atmosphere. On-screen text reinforces her commentary, such as 'That's all I wear,' 'I am so good obsessed with it,' and 'I have a lot of vintage Gucci sunglasses.'

active_entities.Kendall Jenner: Wearing a white t-shirt, blue jeans, and a beige The Row coat; she accessorizes with black boots and vintage Gucci sunglasses, gesturing expressively while describing her outfit in a bright, stylish room.

discovered_new_entities.Black boots: Pointed-toe, mid-calf black leather boots with ankle ties, praised for their comfort and stylish appearance, described as a 'take on a riding boot' and her 'ultimate favorite.'

segments.caption: The video transitions from a polished, professional look to a more casual, travel-ready ensemble. Kendall Jenner, previously seen in a beige The Row coat, white t-shirt, blue jeans, and black boots, now shifts into a relaxed 'Airport Look' for Thursday. She changes into a distressed black leather jacket with a vintage Harley-Davidson graphic tee, light-wash vintage Levi’s 501 jeans, and a black New York Yankees cap. She accessorizes with a black shoulder bag and black pointed-toe boots, emphasizing comfort and style for travel. On-screen text highlights her travel strategy: carrying leggings for in-flight comfort and changing into them after security. The setting remains the same bright, stylish room with bookshelves, clothing racks, and decorative elements, but the mood shifts to a more laid-back, practical vibe. The video uses split-screen to show close-ups of the cap and jacket details, while Kendall walks confidently, explaining her outfit choices and travel tips.

active_entities.Kendall Jenner: Wearing a distressed black leather jacket, vintage Harley-Davidson graphic tee, light-wash vintage Levi’s 501 jeans, black New York Yankees cap, black shoulder bag, and black pointed-toe boots; she gestures while explaining her travel outfit in a bright, stylish room.

segments.caption: The video segment begins with Kendall Jenner showcasing her 'Airport Look' in a bright, stylish room filled with bookshelves, a clothing rack, and decorative items. She wears a distressed black leather jacket over a vintage Harley-Davidson graphic tee, paired with light-wash vintage Levi’s 501 jeans, black pointed-toe boots, and a black New York Yankees cap worn backward. She gestures while explaining her outfit, highlighting the jeans’ fit and the boots’ height, noting they’re men’s and go up to the knee. She adjusts her jacket, zips it up, and checks her reflection in a full-length mirror, adding Kendall’s sunglasses for a final touch. On-screen text labels the outfit components: 'Good Leather Jacket,' 'Vintage Tee,' 'Worn Jeans,' 'Boots,' and 'Kendall’s Sunglasses.' The scene transitions with a 'FRIDAY' title card, and Kendall reappears in a new 'Vacation Look': a white Bode shirt over a black bra top, paired with black flowy pants and sandals. She describes the outfit as comfortable and ideal for vacation, with on-screen text labeling it 'Vacation Look.' The room remains consistent throughout, with natural lighting and a curated, stylish aesthetic.

segments.caption: The video segment begins with a woman in a bright, stylish room, wearing a white Bode shirt open over a black bra top, paired with black flowy pants and sandals, embodying a relaxed 'Vacation Look'. She adjusts her shirt, then turns to showcase the outfit from different angles. She walks toward a bookshelf, picks up a large, vibrant yellow tote bag adorned with personal and whimsical designs—including a Jeep, a Scorpio constellation, a cowboy boot labeled 'Kung Fu Kenny', and a patch reading 'Sedona Red Rock'—and slings it over her shoulder. She expresses her love for the bag, revealing it was a birthday gift and personalized with her dog’s name, 'Arizona'. She also mentions it’s perfect for beach trips, holding books and her phone. She puts on vintage Gucci sunglasses, smiles, and gestures to the camera, summarizing the look as her 'vacation vibe'. The scene transitions with a 'SATURDAY' title card, and she reappears in a completely different outfit: a sleek black leather mini dress, sheer black tights, and red pointed-toe heels, striking a pose with arms outstretched, introducing her 'Night Out Look'. The room remains consistent throughout, with a clothing rack, bookshelves, a mirror, and a floral arrangement visible, maintaining a warm, curated aesthetic.

segments.caption: The video segment opens with a title card introducing the 'Night Out Look,' transitioning into a full shot of Kendall Jenner standing in a bright, stylish room with bookshelves, a clothing rack, and a full-length mirror. She is wearing a form-fitting black leather mini dress with a V-neckline, sheer black tights, and red pointed-toe heels. She gestures expressively as she speaks, emphasizing her comfort and confidence in the outfit, describing it as 'cute and sexy.' She highlights the dress’s perfect fit and mentions her love for Bottega Veneta, noting she owns the dress, earrings, and shoes from the brand. She shares that she wore a similar version to the US Open the previous year and praises the brand’s consistent quality. She then picks up a small, structured red bag with gold hardware, explaining it’s a great match for the Bottega look and ideal for a night out. The camera alternates between full-body shots, close-ups of her legs and shoes, and mirror reflections, capturing her movements and the outfit’s details. The lighting remains soft and natural, enhancing the luxurious feel of the scene. On-screen text reinforces her commentary, including phrases like 'I love to be really comfortable when I go out,' 'Bottega dress, Bottega shoes,' and 'I got this whole look on Fwrd.' The segment ends with her holding the red bag, smiling, and looking satisfied with the complete ensemble.

segments.caption: The video segment begins with Kendall Jenner showcasing a sleek, form-fitting black leather mini dress paired with sheer black tights and red pointed-toe heels, holding a vibrant red Bottega bag. She stands in a bright, stylish room with a clothing rack, bookshelves, and a full-length mirror, describing the outfit as ideal for a night out or dinner, emphasizing comfort and confidence. On-screen text labels the key pieces: 'Little Black Dress,' 'Semi Sheers,' 'Fun Bag,' and 'Croc Mules.' The scene transitions with a 'SUNDAY' title card, and Kendall changes into a black workout bodysuit with white socks and white sneakers, revealing it’s her workout day. She explains her morning routine, mentioning she’s going for a Pilates class. She then adds a navy blue 'USA' sweatshirt, which she notes was her dad’s, describing it as cozy and worn-in. The split-screen format highlights her outfit changes, with close-ups of the sweatshirt and her playful gestures, maintaining a casual, personal tone throughout.

segments.caption: The video segment begins with Kendall Jenner in a bright, stylish room with bookshelves and a clothing rack, wearing a navy blue 'USA' sweatshirt over a grey collared shirt, black shorts, white socks, and white Adidas Samba trainers. She introduces her most-used black leather tote bag, describing it as a 'good slouchy tote bag' from The Row that goes with everything. She demonstrates its versatility by adjusting it on her shoulder and showing its interior. She then adds her signature dark sunglasses, labeled 'Kendall’s Sunglasses,' completing the casual, everyday look. On-screen text labels the full outfit: 'Carry All' (the tote), 'Dad’s Fleece' (the sweatshirt), 'Romper' (the shorts), and 'Adidas Samba Trainers.' After posing confidently, she transitions into a new look: a flowing, light grey sleeveless maxi dress, barefoot, suggesting a more relaxed or evening aesthetic. The scene ends with a quick cut to the production credits, listing roles like Producer, Camera Operators, and Gaffer, before fading to black.

active_entities.Kendall’s Sunglasses: Dark, stylish sunglasses worn at the end of the segment to complete the outfit, adding a finishing touch to the casual ensemble.

discovered_new_entities.Production Credits: On-screen text listing production roles such as Producer, Camera Operators, AC/DIT, Gaffer, and Production Assistants, displayed in a clean, minimalist font against a white background.

segments.caption: The video segment transitions from a series of production credits to a final brand reveal. Initially, the screen displays a clean, minimalist white background with black text listing various crew members and their roles, including Otto Gaiser (Key Grip), David Lowrey Jr (Sound Recordist), Dani Michelle (Wardrobe Stylist), Maren Taylor (Wardrobe Assistant), Mary Phillips (Makeup Artist), and Jen Atkin (Hair Stylist). This is followed by additional credits for Simone Moscovitch (Set Designer), Sierra Fotouhi (Set Design Assistant), Darnell Depradine (Editor), and Jasjeet Singh (Localisation Editor). The next frame lists production management roles: Katie Haworth (Production Assistant), Francesca Hartley (Production Coordinator), Benjamin Whitley (Producer, Local Language), and Nikki Hopkins (Production Manager). The final credit frame features Tom Sandford (Senior Lead, Central Productions), Michael Gora (VP, Production Operations, Digital Video, Local Language), Ezzie Chidi-Ofong (SVP, Digital Video, Local Language), and Peerspace (Location). The segment concludes with the iconic 'VOGUE' logo centered on the screen, presented in a bold, classic serif font against the same white background, signaling the end of the production credits and the brand’s association with the content.

active_entities.Production Credits: On-screen text listing production roles such as Key Grip, Sound Recordist, Wardrobe Stylist, Makeup Artist, Hair Stylist, Set Designer, Editor, Production Assistant, Production Coordinator, Producer, Production Manager, Senior Lead, VP, SVP, and Location, displayed in a clean, minimalist black font on a white background.

discovered_new_entities.VOGUE Logo: The iconic 'VOGUE' brand name displayed in a bold, classic serif font, centered on a white background, marking the conclusion of the credits and the brand’s identity.

entity_library.Black pointed-toe boots: Pointed-toe, mid-calf black leather boots, noted for their height and comfort, worn with the 'Airport Look'.
entity_library.Kendall’s Sunglasses: Dark, stylish sunglasses worn at the end of the segment to complete the outfit, adding a finishing touch to the casual ensemble.
entity_library.White Bode shirt: A white, long-sleeved, relaxed-fit shirt worn open over a black bra top, featuring subtle black stitching details along the front placket.
entity_library.Black bra top: A simple, form-fitting black top worn as a base layer under the white Bode shirt, visible at the neckline and midriff.
entity_library.Black flowy pants: Loose, wide-leg black pants with a slouchy, comfortable fit, paired with flat sandals for a casual vacation aesthetic.
entity_library.Sandals: Simple, flat black sandals with a minimal strap design, worn for comfort and ease during the 'Vacation Look'.
entity_library.Vacation Look: On-screen text labeling the outfit as a relaxed, comfortable ensemble ideal for travel and leisure, featuring the white Bode shirt, black bra top, black flowy pants, sandals, and custom bag.
entity_library.Custom Bag: A large, bright yellow tote bag with a personalized, eclectic design featuring a Jeep, a Scorpio constellation, a cowboy boot labeled 'Kung Fu Kenny', a 'Sedona Red Rock' patch, and the name 'Arizona'—symbolizing personal memories and identity.
entity_library.Black leather mini dress: A form-fitting, sleeveless black leather dress with a V-neckline, worn with sheer black tights and red heels, described as comfortable, sexy, and perfectly fitting.
entity_library.Sheer black tights: Opaque black tights with a sheer texture, worn under the black leather mini dress to add sophistication and coverage, noted for their seamless fit.
entity_library.Red pointed-toe heels: Elegant, high-heeled shoes with a pointed toe and red patent finish, adding a pop of color and glamour to the 'Night Out Look', described as a favorite for going out.
entity_library.Night Out Look: On-screen text introducing the outfit segment, featuring the black leather mini dress, sheer tights, red heels, and Bottega accessories, designed for evening events.
entity_library.Bottega earrings: Gold, chunky hoop earrings worn with the black leather mini dress, part of the Bottega Veneta ensemble, described as a favorite designer piece.
entity_library.Workout bodysuit: A black, form-fitting one-piece athletic outfit with thin straps and shorts, worn with white socks and white sneakers for a casual, functional look.
entity_library.White sneakers: Classic white athletic shoes with black stripes, worn with the workout bodysuit for comfort and style during her morning routine.
entity_library.Navy blue 'USA' sweatshirt: A vintage, oversized navy sweatshirt with 'USA' in bold red and white letters, described as cozy and worn-in, originally belonging to her father, worn over a grey collared shirt.
entity_library.SUNDAY title card: A bold, black text overlay reading 'SUNDAY' that appears as a transition between outfit segments, signaling the start of a new day and look.
entity_library.Work Out Look: On-screen text labeling the athletic outfit segment, appearing in a split-screen format with a close-up of Kendall’s face and full-body shot, emphasizing the casual, functional nature of the look.
entity_library.Black leather tote bag: A large, slouchy black leather tote bag from The Row, described as her most-worn bag, carried on her shoulder and shown in close-up, with a simple, versatile design.
entity_library.Adidas Samba Trainers: Classic white athletic shoes with black stripes, worn with white socks and black shorts, completing the casual, everyday look.
entity_library.Light grey sleeveless maxi dress: A flowing, elegant, light grey dress with a V-neckline and sheer overlay, worn barefoot, suggesting a relaxed or evening look, replacing the previous casual outfit.
entity_library.Production Credits: On-screen text listing production roles such as Key Grip, Sound Recordist, Wardrobe Stylist, Makeup Artist, Hair Stylist, Set Designer, Editor, Production Assistant, Production Coordinator, Producer, Production Manager, Senior Lead, VP, SVP, and Location, displayed in a clean, minimalist black font on a white background.
entity_library.VOGUE Logo: The iconic 'VOGUE' brand name displayed in a bold, classic serif font, centered on a white background, marking the conclusion of the credits and the brand’s identity.
